insights.title: Deloitte leads on reported scale
insights.body: Deloitte represents 32.0% of the Big Four's FY2025 reported revenue in this dataset.

insights.title: Deloitte has the strongest five-year compound growth
insights.body: Reported revenue grew at approximately 8.2% a year from FY2020 to FY2025.

insights.title: PwC leads the directional productivity proxy
insights.body: FY2025 reported revenue per disclosed person is about $156k, with workforce-definition caveats kept visible.

sources.title: DELOITTE TOUCHE TOHMATSU LIMITED company overview
sources.notes: Authoritative current registry record for legal form, status, incorporation date, registered office, company number, and accounts reference date.

sources.title: About Deloitte Ukraine - Deloitte history and global scale table
sources.notes: Official Deloitte history page with annual global revenue and people table for 2010-2018; workforce values are rounded and one value is a lower bound.

sources.title: Deloitte 2014 Global Impact Report - Performance table
sources.notes: Historical official performance table with FY2012-FY2014 revenue, growth, and member-firm counts. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

sources.title: Deloitte 2015 Global Report - Performance table
sources.notes: Historical official performance table with FY2013-FY2015 revenue, growth, service, region, and member-firm counts. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

sources.title: Deloitte 2017 Global Impact Report - Performance table
sources.notes: Historical official performance table with FY2015-FY2017 revenue, growth, service, region, and workforce figures. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

sources.title: Deloitte 2019 Global Impact Report - Performance metrics
sources.notes: Historical official performance metrics with FY2017-FY2019 revenue, growth, service, region, and workforce figures. The legacy Deloitte URL returns 404 after site migration; an accessible third-party archive of the official report is recorded.

sources.title: Deloitte 2021 Global Impact Report - Performance metrics
sources.notes: Official performance metrics PDF with FY2019-FY2021 revenue, growth, service, region, and workforce figures.

sources.title: Deloitte 2023 Global Impact Report - Performance metrics and reporting frameworks
sources.notes: Official 46-page 2023 performance report. The migrated URL filename says 2022, but the downloaded document identifies itself as the 2023 Global Impact Report.

sources.title: Performance metrics and reporting frameworks - Deloitte 2025 Global Impact Report
sources.notes: Official 51-page performance report. FY2024 service-line data are restated under the business-unit structure introduced in 2024; monetary values are presented in US dollars.

sources.title: Deloitte network, brand and alliances
sources.notes: Current official explanation of DTTL, member-firm independence, and the reporting organization perimeter.

sources.title: Deloitte office locations
sources.notes: Current official directory landing page. It states 150+ countries and territories, six continents, and hundreds of locations, but gives no exact global office count or separate country and territory counts.

sources.title: Deloitte Announces Aggregate Revenue Results of US$26.6 Billion
sources.notes: Official DTTL announcement distributed by PR Newswire; includes FY2010 aggregate revenue and growth table.

sources.title: Deloitte Continues as an Engine of Employment Creation and Announces Record Revenues of US$28.8 Billion
sources.notes: Official DTTL announcement distributed by PR Newswire; includes FY2011 aggregate revenue, growth, and workforce.

sources.title: Deloitte reports FY2025 revenue of US$70.5 billion
sources.notes: Official FY2025 revenue announcement; also states more than 470,000 people and presence in more than 150 countries and territories.

sources.title: ERNST & YOUNG GLOBAL LIMITED overview
sources.notes: Authoritative UK registry record: company number 04328808; active; incorporated 26 November 2001; private company limited by guarantee without share capital.

sources.title: Global review 2011
sources.notes: Archived official FY11 Global Review PDF; printed pages 41-43 contain exact revenue and people tables and the combined-information basis.

sources.title: Global review 2012 - Facts and figures
sources.notes: Archived official FY12 facts-and-figures page; combined, not consolidated, global financial information.

metrics.description: Global network member-firm revenue exactly as reported
metrics.exclusions: Do not assume consolidated corporate revenue
metrics.known_definition_issues: Aggregate/combined/gross terminology and reimbursable-expense treatment differ
metrics.comparability_requirements: Same reporting perimeter; preserve fiscal dates and revenue definition

metrics.description: Year-over-year growth exactly as highlighted by the source
metrics.known_definition_issues: May be local currency, constant currency, reported currency, or continuing operations

metrics.metric_name_canonical: Global revenue growth in local currency
Global revenue growth in constant currency
Global revenue growth in US dollars
metrics.known_definition_issues: May differ from growth calculated from rounded headline values

metrics.description: Global workforce exactly as defined by the source
metrics.known_definition_issues: Average FTE, period-end headcount, and partner inclusion vary

metrics.description: Revenue for a source-defined global service line
metrics.exclusions: Do not split combined categories without support
metrics.comparability_requirements: Original and canonical service labels required

metrics.description: Revenue for a source-defined global region
metrics.exclusions: Do not force a country bridge
metrics.known_definition_issues: Regional boundaries differ, especially India and Central Asia

metrics.description: Countries served or operated in, excluding territories only when the source separates them
metrics.exclusions: Do not treat offices or cities as countries
metrics.known_definition_issues: Many sources combine countries and territories

metrics.description: Combined country-and-territory presence exactly as reported
metrics.exclusions: Do not relabel as countries only
Do not substitute cities or countries

metrics.description: Number of network member firms exactly as reported
Locations in the global network exactly as reported
metrics.exclusions: Do not relabel locations as offices or cities
metrics.known_definition_issues: Location, office, and city definitions differ

metrics.description: Cities in which the global network operates exactly as reported
metrics.exclusions: Do not relabel cities as offices or locations
metrics.known_definition_issues: City and metropolitan-area definitions may differ
metrics.comparability_requirements: Exact as-of date and source term

metrics.description: Client-facing entities in the global network exactly as reported
metrics.exclusions: Do not substitute legal entities or member firms

metrics.description: Combined member-firm-and-affiliate count when the source does not permit separation
metrics.inclusions: Member firms and affiliates exactly as source-listed
metrics.exclusions: Do not relabel as member firms only
metrics.known_definition_issues: Affiliate status and entity structures differ across networks
metrics.comparability_requirements: Compare only with equally combined counts

entities.legal_form: Private company limited by guarantee without share capital
entities.notes: Registered office: 1 New Street Square, London, EC4A 3HQ. DTTL is the coordinating entity and does not provide services to clients. Companies House accounts are made up to 31 May.

Global network comprising Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited (DTTL), its member firms, and related entities; it is not a partnership, single firm, or multinational corporation. Aggregate financial reporting uses a 1 June to 31 May fiscal year and presents monetary values in US dollars.

entities.legal_form: Private company limited by guarantee without share capital
entities.notes: Central coordinating entity. EY states that it has no financial operations, does not provide services to clients, and does not control or own member firms.
Global network comprising separate member firms of Ernst & Young Global Limited; the network is not a single global corporate entity.
Coordinated by KPMG International Limited; member firms are separate legal entities and KPMG International provides no client services.
Registered office: 15 Canada Square, London, E14 5GL.

entities.legal_form: Network of separate legal entities; not a global partnership or multinational corporation
entities.notes: PwC is the brand used by separate member firms. PwCIL coordinates the network but does not own member firms or provide client services. PwC reports a 1 July-30 June fiscal year. Global revenue is termed aggregated gross revenue, expressed in US dollars at average fiscal-year exchange rates and inclusive of expenses billed to clients; recent reports also state that interterritory revenue is excluded.

entities.legal_form: Private company limited by guarantee without share capital
entities.notes: Registered office: 1 Embankment Place, London, WC2N 6RH. Non-trading coordinating entity; it does not practise accountancy or provide client services. The coordinating role is additionally supported by src_pwc_structure.

Every reported observation must identify an exact page, table, section, or embedded-data locator.
Every reported observation must retain a concise source excerpt sufficient to verify the value.
Every source-ledger row must provide a direct source URL.
Global-core revenue rows retain source-scale values and normalize canonical currency values to full nominal US dollars.
FY labels were checked against each network's verified reporting calendar: Deloitte June-May, PwC and EY July-June, and KPMG October-September.
The initial tranche is global-network-only. Any member-firm observation must be moved to the national-firm module.
Average FTE, period-end headcount, rounded people, and lower-bound disclosures remain separate; do not chart them as one seamless series without a visible timing flag.
Every explicit revision must identify the superseded observation or document why one-to-one lineage is impossible.
These restatements or reclassifications cannot map one-to-one to an older row; their source locator and researcher notes preserve the caveat.
Calculated rows require an explicit transformation; observation-ID lineage is additionally required when the inputs are other observations rather than a directly cited source table.
Every source must carry an A-E source grade.
Every observation must carry 1-5 comparability and confidence scores.
Comparability and confidence scores must be integers from 1 through 5.

searchLog.search_query: site:deloitte.com global offices exact count Deloitte
searchLog.reports_checked: Global office directory;2025 Global Impact Report;FY2025 revenue release
searchLog.reason_unresolved: The current directory says hundreds of locations but supplies no exact global office count or defensible numeric bound.

searchLog.search_query: site:deloitte.com global member firms count DTTL
searchLog.reports_checked: Network structure;global office directory;2025 Global Impact Report
searchLog.reason_unresolved: Official sources explain the network relationship but do not state a current count; the extracted historical series ends at FY2015.
Deloitte publishes only a combined lower bound of 150+ countries and territories, which cannot support a country-only count.
Deloitte publishes only a combined lower bound of 150+ countries and territories, which cannot support a territory-only count.

searchLog.search_query: site:ey.com member firms count EY global
searchLog.reports_checked: EY Network;Member Firms and Affiliates List dated 2026-06-08
searchLog.reason_unresolved: The official list combines member firms and affiliates. Its 525 listed entities cannot be relabeled as member firms only.
No current exact global physical-office count was located in the checked official sources.

searchLog.search_query: site:ey.com countries territories EY global network
searchLog.reason_unresolved: Official sources use a combined countries-and-territories disclosure, so separate country and territory counts were not inferred.

searchLog.search_query: site:ey.com global revenue constant currency EY
searchLog.reports_checked: FY2010-FY2025 global reviews and revenue releases
searchLog.reason_unresolved: EY's directly supported series is labeled local-currency growth. It was not duplicated or relabeled as constant-currency growth without an explicit source definition.

searchLog.search_query: site:assets.kpmg.com KPMG people FY10 annual review
searchLog.reports_checked: 2011 International Annual Review;2013 International Annual Review
searchLog.reason_unresolved: The official FY2011 review reports FY2010 revenue but does not expose a FY2010 workforce total; later exact workforce series begins with FY2012.

searchLog.reports_checked: 2011 International Annual Review;2012-dated official KPMG publications
searchLog.reason_unresolved: Official 2012 publications describe 145000 people but do not establish that figure as the FY2011 average or period-end measure; it is not entered as a FY2011 value.
The official global sources disclose countries and territories but no defensible current global physical-office count; national office directory collection is deferred.

searchLog.search_query: site:kpmg.com/xx member firms count KPMG International 2025
searchLog.reason_unresolved: The governance page explains the member-firm relationship but does not state a current numeric count.

searchLog.search_query: site:pwc.com/gx PwC member firms count network
searchLog.reason_unresolved: Official sources describe separate member firms but do not publish a defensible current numeric member-firm count.
The available wording around 137 territories is ambiguous and was not converted into a separate territory count; the report's 136-country and 636-city facts remain separately labeled.

searchLog.reports_checked: Network structure;2025 Global Annual Review;historical annual reviews
searchLog.reason_unresolved: Recent official reports disclose cities rather than offices. Historical locations, cities, and client-facing entities were retained under distinct metrics and not relabeled.
